textByHashes.ae5ff132bdb90a4dc860246a5cf9d6112cde41b1: What brings you up here, monkey?
textByHashes.97d270f75a346db727fb03b6501a7c004c6c7776: You would do better to explore elsewhere - we are extremely busy at the moment.
textByHashes.edf79e02fc641f8c4f60ed61a0f62075a9d3a98a: That's right - you do. What business have you on our island?
textByHashes.374682a8925f655a61641d7588ce0fea4f222bc6: I don't believe you. You don't look much like any Karamja monkey I've seen.
textByHashes.755a3ca320379b144865f48726dc293f66ff3ffd: I see. Very well, you look genuine enough. Follow me.
textByHashes.286a9d79cd09ed95ad940d465fcf3ebb4e8b7ac5: Sorry, I am far too busy dealing with the invaders right now.
textByHashes.72756cbcf6c743678128d5f42bafff2ed8308ccd: I'm impressed you made it so far, human.
textByHashes.a9b0593b20cae60f410f0461acaf167b6d9e2629: However, I'm afraid that this is the end of the line for you.
